title: Philips Electric Shaver 3000 Series - Wet & Dry Electric Shaver for Men with SkinProtect Technology in Dark Moon, Pop-up Beard Trimmer, Cordless Shaver (Model S3145/00)
features: Comfortable shaving: Philips Series 3000 with SkinProtect Technology gives you a comfortable, clean shave with self-sharpening PowerCut Blades, 5D Pivot & Flex Heads and Wet & Dry use
Designed for life, built to last: with 2 years of self-sharpening steel blade lifetime, enjoy a shaver that performs like new every day, regardless of beard length
Fast, clean shave: 27 self-sharpening PowerCut Blades cut up to 55,000 times per minute right above skin level for a smooth, even shave every time
Shave close: our electric shaver has a 5 direction pivot head that follows every curve of your face, cutting and trimming hair just above skin level for a clean and comfortable shave
Shave wet or dry: shave in the shower or choose to dry shave with the Philips electric shaver series 3000; the shaver stays secure in your hand thanks to the ergonomic shaver handle

Set includes: 1x Philips Series 3000 Electric Shaver for Men, 1x Protective cap, and 1x USB-A Charging Cable for convenient on-the-go charging, compatible with any USB power adapters that you might already have, because at Philips, we drive sustainability in all aspects of product creation, and our ambition is to reduce waste and minimize the number of USB adapters we put in the market
description: Product Description From the world's #1 Electric shaver brand*: Philips Shaver 3000 Series is a Wet & Dry Electric Shaver with SkinProtect Technology that gives you a comfortable, clean shave even on sensitive skin. Its PowerCut Blades are self-sharpening and cut each hair right above skin level for a smooth finish, while the 5D Pivot & Flex Heads follow every curve of your face — cutting just above skin level and protecting your skin from nicks and cuts. Our shaver blades are made from hypoallergenic steel to resist corrosion, prevent impurities and protect your skin. Shave wet or dry and take care of defining your moustache or sideburns with the built-in pop-up trimmer. Clean it at the touch of a button with One-touch open to easily rinse under the tap. A durable Li-ion battery provides 60 minutes of shaving time on a single 1 hour charge. Follow the contours of your face for a clean shave that adjusts to your beard for an effortless shave. In a hurry? A 5 minute quick charge gives you enough power for one shave. Charge with a USB-A charging cable (power adapter not included). *Euromonitor International Limiter, retail sales value, per body shavers category definition, 2022 data, research conducted in December 2022 Safety Warning Use caution to avoid cuts or skin irritation. Clean the shaver with running water and the provided cleaning brush. Do not immerse in water or use while charging.
